◆ONE PIECE
『ハラハラドキドキ最高に“ﾊｲｴﾅｼﾞｰ”』

アニメももちろん大、大好きなんですがリアルで動いてる人々も見応えMAXです！特にゾロのミホークとの戦いの後の「2度と負けねえから！」鬼響くので実写版もハラハラドキドキ最高に“ﾊｲｴﾅｼﾞｰ”な作品となってるのでチェックして頂けると嬉しいデス‼️

◆3Li¥en（ラッパー）
「RAPSTAR 2025」に出演し、特徴的な水色のヘアーと、埼玉出身なのに溢れ出る関西弁トークで強烈なインパクトを残した。日本語英語を自在に操り、ゴスペルにルーツを持ち多様なジャンルを乗りこなすそのラップスタイルは唯一無二。

quoted_tweet.text:
Major highlight thread for projects (drama/movies) actress Kim Minha so far:

1. Dead End Job (NETFLIX) (2026)
Genre: Mystery, Horror, Fantasy.
Director: Han Junhee (Coin Locker Girl, D.P1&2, Road) & Kim Damin (A Killer Paradox)
Screenwriter: Kyung Minsun (Tarot)
Filming status: Complete & 8 Episodes
Company: Shortcake (mostly drama directed by Han Junhee but they also produce movies: Pilot (2024) (Jo Jeongsuk)  & Killing Romance (Lee Honey) (2023)
In this drama Minha will play as Byeon Jiyun, Lee Jaewook’s younger sister. From the synopsis, Jiyun has a really free-spirited personality, and in her latest interview last year, she said that this character is totally different from the roles she’s played before.

2. Messily Ever After (NETFLIX) (TBE)
Genre: Realistic romance and comedy
Director: Seo Jungmin (new director)
Filming Status: From this February to May
Company: Bombaram Films Kim Jiyoung: Born 1982 & Love Untangled
In this movie Minha will play as Soohyun a capable curator who strives for perfection in her work and career, yet displays a surprising charm that can be easily ruined by love and jealousy.

#김민하 #KimMinHa

kept.text:
Netflixの日本のTVシリーズはエログロと反社ばかりで飽きた、新鮮さが感じられない旨のポストが複数飛んできたが、Netflixでは『First Love 初恋』(2022)、『さよならのつづき』(2024)、『グラスハート』(2025)などコンスタントにラブストーリーも配信している。

それでも「NetflixJP＝エログロ・反社」のイメージが定着したのは、結局、多くの視聴者が「エログロ・反社」を観たいと欲望しているからだ。Netflixが過激な方向に寄せているのではなく、視聴者の欲望を叶えているにすぎない。

『九条の大罪』『地獄に堕ちるわよ』がヒットしたこともあり、この流れはまだまだ続くだろうな。
(というか、作品のクオリティーだけで考えても、このラブストーリー3作は九條や地獄に比べて圧倒的に劣る)。

The WONDERfools yang akan tayang di Netflix tanggal 15 Mei ini bergenre aksi, misteri, komedi, dan fantasi.  Sekelompok orang biasa di Desa Haeseong tiba-tiba dapat kekuatan super secara misterius. 

Alih-alih jadi pahlawan keren seperti di seri atau drama lain, mereka justru kelihatan aneh dan kurang pro 🤣 makanya mereka dinamakan The WONDERfools.  

Mereka harus menghadapi ancaman dari sosok berbahaya sambil berusaha mengendalikan kekuatan baru demi melindungi Desa Haeseong.

tweet.text:
📰 NETFLIX: A Bunch of Goofy Misfits Out to Save the World: Netflix Releases Main Trailer for ‘The WONDERfools’

“Netflix has unveiled the main trailer and poster for The WONDERfools, a 1999-set superpower comedy adventure series about a group of neighborhood misfits who unexpectedly gain powers and find themselves, against all odds, trying to save their city — and maybe the world.

The main trailer opens with a striking moment as Chae-ni, blood dripping from her nose, questions if she’s going to die — and instantly draws viewers in. Chae-ni, the neighborhood’s official troublemaker, shouts that she wants to live to see the end of the world, only to suddenly acquire teleportation powers that send her bouncing from an abandoned greenhouse to a boat, and even tumbling into the Joseon era through a wardrobe. Meanwhile, Ro-bin is left stunned when he casually tosses a can and it punches through a wall, and Gyeong-hun finds his feet stuck firmly to the ground. Their reactions tease at how their everyday lives are upended by these unexpected powers, heightening curiosity about the trio’s story. Things take another turn when the three come across Woonjung, who skillfully uses his telekinesis powers. Calling him ‘master’, they begin to follow him around, much to his flustered dismay — further teasing the crew’s unpredictable chemistry. 

Elsewhere, word spreads that people are mysteriously disappearing again, just as they did 20 years ago — and Dr. Ha Won-do and the three Wunderkinder are introduced, adding tension to the story. As curiosity grows over their abilities and the threat they may pose to Haeseong-si, audiences see the four misfits scrambling to face the looming peril.”

#ChaEunwoo #TheWonderFools #원더풀스
#차은우 #チャウヌ #车银优 #ชาอึนอู #車銀優
